title: UniversalBoneMealGrowableOresCompat
description: A Fabric mod that adds compatibility between Universal Bonemeal and Growable Ores.
body:
A Fabric mod that adds compatibility between Universal Bonemeal and Growable Ores.
I only really made it because I was frustrated that the two mods didn't work together.
I'm only publishing it in case anyone else has problems with this.
